name: Deluxe Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and powdered sugar together until smooth.
2. Add the egg, vanilla, and almond extract to the mixture. Mix well until combined.
3. Stir in the flour, baking soda, and cream of tartar until a dough forms.
4. Chill the dough for 2-3 hours.
5. Roll out the chilled dough on a floured surface to about 1/4 inch thickness.
6. Cut into shapes using cookie cutters.
7. Bake on a greased cookie sheet at 375°F (190°C) for 7-8 minutes, or until lightly golden.
8. Allow cookies to cool completely before decorating with colored sugar if desired.
These cookies are sweet and delicious on their own but can be decorated as you like before serving. They look especially festive when decorated in green and red sugar during the holiday season.
